query: SELECT cg.maxQuantity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON p.id = cg.productId WHERE p.establishmentId = 60018 AND cg.name = 'Adicionais' GROUP BY cg.maxQuantity ORDER BY cg.maxQuantity;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT cg.maxQuantity, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON p.id = cg.productId WHERE p.establishmentId = 60018 AND cg.name = 'Adicionais' GROUP BY cg.maxQuantity ORDER BY cg.maxQuantity;
